mapper.select: SELECT distinct evt_nm FROM xeus.v_mon_evet_list WHERE evt_nm IS NOT NULL AND test_yn = 'N' AND evt_nm <> '' AND evt_nm <> 'null'

SELECT log.year AS year, count(log.year) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.evt_outb_dtm, 1, 4) AS year FROM xeus.v_mon_evet_list log WHERE log.evt_typ_cd IS NOT NULL AND test_yn = 'N' ) log GROUP BY log.year ORDER BY log.year

SELECT COUNT(hist.evt_nm) AS count, hist.evt_nm FROM xeus.v_mon_evet_list hist LEFT JOIN xeus.kais_emd_as AS emd ON st_intersects ( emd._geometry, hist._geometry )
hist.evt_typ_cd IS NOT NULL AND test_yn = 'N'
AND hist.evt_outb_dtm LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND hist.evt_outb_dtm LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
AND hist.evt_typ_cd = #{evtTypCd}
AND emd.emd_cd = #{emdCd}
GROUP BY evt_nm

SELECT COUNT(emd.emd_cd), emd.emd_cd, emd_kor_nm FROM xeus.v_mon_evet_list hist LEFT JOIN xeus.kais_emd_as AS emd ON st_intersects ( emd._geometry, hist._geometry )
hist.evt_typ_cd IS NOT NULL AND test_yn = 'N'
AND hist.evt_outb_dtm LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND hist.evt_outb_dtm LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
AND hist.evt_typ_cd = #{evtTypCd}
GROUP BY emd.emd_cd,emd_kor_nm
